Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionBranchCondition

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionBranchCondition
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionBranchCondition, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
public class ExecutionBranchCondition extends AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement> implements IExecutionBranchCondition
The default implementation of IExecutionBranchCondition.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExecutionBranchCondition

      public ExecutionBranchCondition(ITreeSettings settings, Node proofNode, String additionalBranchLabel)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
      proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
      additionalBranchLabel - The optional additional branch label.

    • lazyComputeName

      protected String lazyComputeName() throws ProofInputException
      Computes the name of this node lazily when AbstractExecutionElement.getName() is called the first time.
      Specified by:
      lazyComputeName in class AbstractExecutionElement
      Returns:
      The human readable name of this IExecutionNode.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • isBranchConditionComputed

      public boolean isBranchConditionComputed()
      Checks if the value of IExecutionBranchCondition.getBranchCondition() is already computed.
      Specified by:
      isBranchConditionComputed in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      true value of IExecutionBranchCondition.getBranchCondition() is already computed, false value of IExecutionBranchCondition.getBranchCondition() needs to be computed.

    • getBranchCondition

      public Term getBranchCondition() throws ProofInputException

      Returns the branch condition as Term.

      If this branch conditions merged proof nodes this Term is the overall branch condition.

      Specified by:
      getBranchCondition in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The branch condition as Term.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • lazyComputeBranchCondition

      protected void lazyComputeBranchCondition() throws ProofInputException
      Computes the branch condition lazily when getBranchCondition() or getFormatedBranchCondition() is called the first time.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

    • isPathConditionChanged

      public boolean isPathConditionChanged()
      Checks if this node has changed the path condition of the parent.
      Specified by:
      isPathConditionChanged in interface IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
      Overrides:
      isPathConditionChanged in class AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
      Returns:
      true has different path condition compared to its parent, false has same path condition as parent.

      public Term getPathCondition() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the path condition to reach this node as Term.

      Overrides:

      Returns:
      The path condition to reach this node as Term.

      protected void lazyComputePathCondition() throws ProofInputException
      Computes the path condition lazily when getPathCondition() or getFormatedPathCondition() is called the first time.

      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

      public void addMergedProofNode(Node node)
      Adds a merged proof Node.
      Parameters:
      node - The proof Node to add.

    • getMergedProofNodes

      public Node[] getMergedProofNodes()

      Returns the branch condition nodes in KeY's proof tree which are merged into this IExecutionBranchCondition.

      It includes also IExecutionElement.getProofNode().

      Specified by:
      getMergedProofNodes in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The merged proof nodes.

    • getMergedBranchCondtions

      public Term[] getMergedBranchCondtions() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the branch condition Terms.
      Specified by:
      getMergedBranchCondtions in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      The branch condition Terms.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

      Computes the branch condition lazily when getMergedBranchCondtions() is called the first time.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception

    • isMergedBranchCondition

      public boolean isMergedBranchCondition()
      Checks if this branch condition is a merged one.
      Specified by:
      isMergedBranchCondition in interface IExecutionBranchCondition
      Returns:
      true is merged branch condition, false is normal branch condition.
